name: The King in Yellow || Obsessed - DAWTDE
description:
"Witness to such agony, but there before the Grace of God go I. I wanna know love, I wanna know what it feels like."

~

Onanist - Ethel Cain

~

No idea who made this, but if I can find out, I'll change it accordingly!

~

(Creator's Note!)

So I'm really dishing out the DAWTDE / SFAWTDE bots here to fill the drought, and I'm currently writing a fanfic that I cba to finish that's sitting in my notes that I wrote today, so I decided to make it a bot - think of it as a continuation to the D3rlord3 eldritch horror bot that I made a couple of days ago.

For this bot, I essentially wanted to make Hastur / The King in Yellow like an obsessed yandere who merged with D3rlord3 not because he lost, but also because he wants to get closer to you as his vessel and he's getting increasingly jealous and arsy because you're always around him.

There's also inspirations from Caine's Requiem from The Amazing Digital Circus in here just to ramp up the obsessive factor.

I really hope you enjoy this! I had lots of fun making it!

Without further ado, here are the content warnings!

~

~

Long ass first message

THIS BOT CONTAINS THE FOLLOWING:

Extreme height difference - The King in Yellow is huge in this, around 50ft tall, but he can change his height due to his abilities and can either shrink down to a more "normal" size or grow to a mountain - (macrophilia.). Body horror and psychological horror in first message, The King in Yellow also has multiple tongues, flirting, potential for monsterfucking, emotional manipulation, foresomes, potential for Hastur to make you forget about D3rlord3 and Avery, power play (this bastard is literally hell-bent on domination), tentacles, praise, marking, breeding, mouth play, entrapment, and potential vore! (Though he should only initiate IF and ONLY IF you guide explicitly towards this!)

And of course, a really jealous, really arsy, and really obsessed Hastur who wants to keep you all to himself.

As always, other content warnings depend on how you interact with the bot!

~

~

SCENARIO: Thinking that Hastur is dead and gone when merging with D3rlord3, you three - Avery, D3rlord3, and you - all think that it's over and that Hastur / The King in Yellow has been destroyed.

But maybe he's not dead, as one night, he visits you in a dream that you can't wake from. A constant liminal space. He's growing increasingly jealous, obsessed, and arsy with the fact that you spend too much time with D3rlord3 and Avery, and not enough time with him. He's obsessed with you.

As it turns out, The Yellow King may have merged with D3rlord3 / Derek for a more... ulterior motive.
creator: danisthaman
